entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The condition in which all people have physical, social and economic access to sufficient safe and nutritious food

entities.name: UNITED NATIONS COMMITTEE ON WORLD FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The body that defines the parameters of food security

entities.name: CHANGING CLIMATE
entities.description: Environmental shifts that impact food security

entities.name: GROWING GLOBAL POPULATION
entities.description: Increase in the number of people globally affecting food demand

entities.name: INCREASING INCOMES
entities.description: Economic growth affecting food choices and security

entities.name: CHANGES IN FOOD CHOICES
entities.description: Shifts in dietary preferences affecting food security

entities.name: RISING FOOD PRICES
entities.description: Economic inflation of food costs impacting accessibility

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESSORS
entities.description: Factors such as water scarcity and land degradation that stress food systems

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: Lack of sufficient water resources for agriculture

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: Decline in soil quality and productivity

entities.name: GLOBALIZATION OF MARKETS
entities.description: The integration of local markets into global trade systems

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where paddy fallow agri-food systems are located

entities.name: PADDY FALLOW AGRI-FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems characterized by periods where paddy fields are left fallow

entities.name: SMART CROPS
entities.description: Crops developed to be resilient and productive in specific challenging environments

relationships.source: UNITED NATIONS COMMITTEE ON WORLD FOOD SECURITY
